_comment: Example token fill for page.template.html. Copy the page, replace each {{TOKEN}} with the value below (or your own), review against landing-conversion.md, deploy. Sourced from .launchthesis/config.yaml + your discover brief. This example mirrors a Narro-style concept but is honesty-floor clean: SOCIAL_PROOF is intentionally empty (no fabricated counts).
HEADLINE: A realtime copilot for your thoughts
SUBHEAD: Narro listens, understands, and helps you turn overthinking into clarity and action.
FEATURE_3_BODY: Get clarity, create tasks, make progress.
WAITLIST_HEADING: Be the first to try Narro
WAITLIST_SUB: We're building Narro to help you think clearer and live better. Join the waitlist and get early access.
_SOCIAL_PROOF_note: Leave empty unless you have a REAL number. To show it, set the .socialproof element's data-enabled="true" in the HTML and put e.g. 'Join 312 others on the waitlist' here. Never fabricate a count.
WTP_PROMPT: Want it sooner? Reserve your spot — a small refundable hold moves you to the front of the line.
REFUND_LINE: It's a refundable hold, not a charge — released if we don't ship.
TAGLINE: Your space for thoughts. Your path to clarity.
